# Nepal Trek AI

AI-powered travel planner for Nepal. Personalized itineraries, safety protocols, budget tracking, and AMS self-assessment for Himalayan adventures.

Built with **FastAPI** + **React 19** + **PostgreSQL 16** + **scikit-learn**.

**API Docs (auto-generated by FastAPI):**
- Swagger UI: [`http://localhost:8000/docs`](http://localhost:8000/docs)
- ReDoc: [`http://localhost:8000/redoc`](http://localhost:8000/redoc)

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Backend | FastAPI (Python 3.12), SQLAlchemy 2.0, Pydantic v2, Alembic |
| Frontend | React 19, TypeScript 6, Vite 8, Tailwind CSS v4 |
| State | Zustand 5, TanStack React Query v5 |
| Routing | React Router DOM v7 |
| Auth | JWT (python-jose) + bcrypt (passlib) |
| ML | scikit-learn (TF-IDF, K-Means, Cosine Similarity) |
| Database | PostgreSQL 16 (via Docker) |
| Dates | @sbmdkl/nepali-date-converter (AD ↔ BS) |
| Animations | Framer Motion v12 |
| Containerization | Docker Compose |

---

## Features

### Core AI Engines
- **Content-Based Recommender** — TF-IDF vectorization + cosine similarity matching user preferences to 40+ destinations
- **Greedy Itinerary Optimizer** — Day-by-day scheduling with altitude constraints, acclimatization rules, and budget tracking
- **Difficulty Classifier** — Rule-based classifier evaluating altitude, terrain, and ascent rate for accurate grading
- **Destination Clusterer** — K-Means (5 clusters: High Himalayan, Cultural Heritage, Wildlife & Terai, Adventure & Mid-Hill, Remote Wilderness)

### User Features
- Interactive 4-step preference elicitation wizard
- Personalized destination recommendations with similarity scores + explanations
- Side-by-side destination comparison (up to 3)
- AI-generated day-by-day trek itineraries (Everest Base Camp, Annapurna Circuit, ABC, Langtang, Manaslu)
- Budget estimation with 15% emergency buffer, permit fee calculations, guide/porter costs
- Safety reports with AMS risk assessment, acclimatization schedule, essential gear, evacuation points
- AMS (Acute Mountain Sickness) self-assessment tool using Lake Louise scoring
- Interactive packing checklist with local NPR prices
- Nepal travel guide with weather, visa info, festivals, emergency contacts
- Save/favorite destinations with per-user scoped storage
- Trip history — save budget plans, view/edit/delete past trips, admin can view all
- Nepali (Bikram Sambat) date conversion on travel date picker

### Authentication & Security
- JWT-based authentication with bcrypt password hashing
- Server restart invalidation — all sessions expire on backend restart (`SERVER_RESTART_ID`)
- Auto-logout on 401 responses (stale/invalid tokens)
- Rate limiting on login — 20 attempts per 5 min window per IP
- Route protection (authenticated and admin-only routes)
- Password strength indicator with real-time feedback (Weak → Very Strong)
- Field-specific validation: name-only regex, email format, password complexity
- Remember me checkbox (sessionStorage vs localStorage)
- Dual-storage auth token reading (localStorage → sessionStorage fallback)
- Comprehensive `clearAllAppData()` wipes all storage on login/logout/401

### Admin Panel
- Warm/light themed responsive sidebar layout
- CRUD management for destinations (add, list, delete)
- User management table with roles, email, join dates
- Expandable trip history per user
- Delete user with two-click confirmation (prevents self-delete)
- Distinct admin badge (shield icon) vs user label everywhere

## Database Schema

### `users`
| Column | Type | Constraints |
|--------|------|-------------|
| id | Integer | PK, auto-increment |
| username | String(80) | UNIQUE, NOT NULL, INDEX |
| email | String(120) | UNIQUE, NOT NULL, INDEX |
| hashed_password | String(255) | NOT NULL |
| role | String(20) | Default: "user" |
| created_at | DateTime | Default: utcnow |

### `destinations`
| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| id | Integer | PK |
| name | String(200) | NOT NULL, INDEX |
| cluster | String(100) | NOT NULL |
| alt_name, region | String(200/100) | Optional |
| altitude_min/max | Integer | In meters |
| terrain | String(100) | e.g. "alpine", "jungle" |
| duration_min/max | Integer | Days |
| cost_per_day_npr/usd | Float | Dual currency |
| difficulty | String(50) | easy/mod/difficult/expert |
| best_seasons | JSON | Array of seasons |
| activities, permits | JSON | String arrays |
| description | Text | Full description |
| highlights | JSON | Array of highlights |
| image_url | String(500) | Optional |
| requires_guide | Boolean | Default false |
| ams_risk | String(50) | Optional |
| fitness_level | String(50) | Optional |
| match_score | Float | Computed by recommender |

### `user_preferences`
| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| id | Integer | PK |
| session_id | String(100) | INDEX |
| budget, budget_currency | Float, String(10) | |
| duration | Integer | Days |
| travel_dates | String(50) | Optional |
| season, interests, fitness_level, travel_type, nationality, starting_city, accommodation_type | Various | See models.py |
| created_at | String(50) | |
| completed | Boolean | Default false |

### `itineraries`
| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| id | Integer | PK |
| session_id | String(100) | INDEX |
| destination_id | Integer | FK-style, not enforced |
| days | JSON | Array of day objects |
| total_cost, total_cost_npr | Float | |
| emergency_buffer | Float | |
| created_at | String(50) | |

### `trip_history`
| Column | Type | Notes |
|--------|------|-------|
| id | Integer | PK |
| user_id | Integer | NOT NULL, INDEX |
| destination_name | String(200) | |
| budget_total | Float | Default 0 |
| budget_currency | String(10) | Default "NPR" |
| duration_days | Integer | Optional |
| accommodation | String(50) | Optional |
| preferences_snapshot | JSON | Full preference dump |
| breakdown | JSON | Budget breakdown array |
| created_at | DateTime | Default: utcnow |

## API Reference

### Health

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/health` | — | Health check + endpoint list |

### Authentication

| Method | Path | Auth | Request Body | Response | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|----------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/auth/register` | — | `{ username, email, password }` | `{ message, user }` | Create account. Validators: name (3-50 chars, letters/spaces/dots/hyphens), email (regex), password (8+ chars, uppercase+lowercase+digit) |
| POST | `/api/auth/login` | — | `{ username, password }` | `{ access_token, token_type, user }` | Login by username or email. Rate limited: 20/5min per IP |
| GET | `/api/auth/me` | JWT | — | `{ id, username, email, role, created_at }` | Current user info |
| PUT | `/api/auth/me` | JWT | `{ username?, email?, current_password?, new_password? }` | `UserOut` | Update profile. Requires current password for password change |
| POST | `/api/auth/refresh` | JWT | — | `{ access_token, token_type }` | Refresh JWT token |

### Destinations

| Method | Path | Auth | Query Params | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/destinations/` | — | `?cluster=High%20Himalayan%20Treks` | List all destinations, optionally filtered by cluster |
| GET | `/api/destinations/{name}` | — | — | Get single destination by name |

### Preferences

| Method | Path | Auth | Request Body | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/preferences/elicit` | — | `PreferenceInput` | Submit preferences, returns summary + next step hint |

### Recommendations

| Method | Path | Auth | Request Body | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/recommendations/recommend` | — | `PreferenceInput` | TF-IDF cosine similarity matching. Returns scored destinations with explanations |

### Itineraries

| Method | Path | Auth | Request Body | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/itineraries/generate` | — | `{ destination_name, duration, budget, fitness_level, starting_city, accommodation_type }` | Greedy optimizer builds day-by-day plan with altitude acclimatization |

### Safety

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/safety/report/{name}` | — | Full safety report: difficulty, AMS risk, acclimatization schedule, gear list, evacuation points, nearest hospital, safety flags |

### Budgets

| Method | Path | Auth | Query Params | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/budgets/estimate/{name}` | — | `?duration=7&accommodation_type=mid&guide_porter_required=false` | Detailed budget breakdown with permits, transport, guide/porter costs, 15% emergency buffer |

### Clusters

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/clusters/` | — | K-Means cluster analysis of all destinations |
| GET | `/api/clusters/{name}` | — | Get cluster info for a single destination |

### Trip History

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/trip-history/save` | JWT | Save a trip record (from budget calculation) |
| GET | `/api/trip-history/my` | JWT | Get current user's trip history (descending) |
| DELETE | `/api/trip-history/{history_id}` | JWT | Delete own trip record (or admin) |

### Admin

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/admin/users` | Admin | List all users ordered by created_at desc |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/users/{user_id}` | Admin | Delete user + their trip history (prevents self-delete) |
| GET | `/api/admin/users/{user_id}/history` | Admin | Get trip history for any user |
| GET | `/api/admin/destinations` | Admin | List all destinations |
| POST | `/api/admin/destinations` | Admin | Create destination |
| PUT | `/api/admin/destinations/{id}` | Admin | Update destination |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/destinations/{id}` | Admin | Delete destination (204 No Content) |

## Frontend Architecture

### Routing (`App.tsx`)

Routes are wrapped in `AuthProvider` context. The `AppContent` component checks `user.role`:

- **Admin users** (`user.role === 'admin'`) — renders `<AdminLayout />` which provides its own `<Routes>`:
  - `/admin` → Admin dashboard (destinations tab)
  - `/admin/destinations` → Admin dashboard (destinations tab)
  - `/admin/users` → Admin dashboard (users tab)
  - `*` → Redirect to `/admin`

- **Regular users / unauthenticated** — renders `<Navbar>` + `<Footer>` with public `<Routes>`:
  - `/` → Home (landing page)
  - `/preferences`, `/budget`, `/trip-history` → `ProtectedRoute` wraps these (redirects to `/login` if unauthenticated)
  - All other routes → Public

- **ProtectedRoute** component checks `loading` (true initially if stored token exists) → `finally(() => setLoading(false))` after `/api/auth/me` validation. Prevents flash-of-login.

### State Management

| Store | Technology | Purpose |
|-------|-----------|---------|
| Auth state | React Context (`useAuth`) | User object, JWT token, login/register/logout |
| Preferences | Zustand (`usePreferencesStore`) | Multi-step wizard form state |
| API cache | TanStack React Query v5 | Query client (optional, not heavily used) |
| Session data | `sessionStorage` | Recommendations result, selected destination |
| User-scoped data | `localStorage` | `favorites_{userId}`, `preferences_draft_{userId}`, `packing_checked_{userId}` |
| Auth tokens | localStorage or sessionStorage | Based on `rememberMe` preference |

### Key Hooks

**`useAuth.tsx`** (AuthProvider) — The central auth hub:
- `getStoredAuth()` — reads localStorage → sessionStorage fallback, validates `username` is a string type
- `storeAuth(token, user, persist)` — stores in localStorage (persist=true) or sessionStorage (persist=false), removes from other storage
- `login(username, password, rememberMe)` — calls `POST /api/auth/login`, runs `clearAllAppData()` before `storeAuth()`
- `register(username, email, password)` — calls `POST /api/auth/register`, shows success toast, redirects to `/login`
- `logout()` — `clearAllAppData()` + resets in-memory auth state + redirects to `/login`
- `clearAllAppData()` — wipes `token`, `user`, `recommendations`, `selectedDestination` from both storages, removes all user-scoped keys, resets Zustand preferences store
- `extractErrorDetail(errData)` — handles both array-format (422 Pydantic validation errors) and string-format (400/401) `detail` fields
- `authHeaders()` — returns `Authorization: Bearer {token}` header, reads localStorage then sessionStorage
- `getUserId()` / `userStorageKey(base)` / `getFavorites()` / `toggleFavorite(id)` — utility functions for scoped per-user storage
- Mount effect: validates stored token via `GET /api/auth/me`, clears data on failure

**`usePreferencesStore.ts`** — Zustand store:
- `preferences` — object with all wizard fields
- `setPreference(key, value)` — partial update
- `reset()` — restore defaults

### Key Pages

| Page | Route | Auth | Description |
|------|-------|------|-------------|
| Home | `/` | — | Landing page with hero, feature cards, season-aware destination preview, CTA |
| Login | `/login` | — | Username/email + password, remember me toggle, redirect support |
| Register | `/register` | — | Name (real-name validation), email, password with strength meter, confirm, terms |
| Preferences | `/preferences` | ✓ | 4-step wizard: trip basics → interests → fitness/style → final details. Includes `NepaliDatePicker` component (AD input + BS equivalent). Auto-saves draft to user-scoped localStorage |
| Recommendations | `/recommendations` | — | List of destination cards with match scores, similarity explanations, save/favorite |
| Destinations | `/destinations` | — | All 40+ destinations in grid, cluster filter, favorites toggle, error state with retry |
| Itinerary | `/itinerary` | — | Day-by-day trek plan with altitude, costs, accommodation, meals, warnings |
| Safety | `/safety` | — | Difficulty classification, AMS risk, acclimatization schedule, gear by altitude, evacuation points |
| Budget | `/budget` | ✓ | Detailed breakdown table, budget vs preference comparison banner, saves trip history |
| DestinationCompare | `/compare` | — | Side-by-side comparison of up to 3 destinations |
| AMSChecker | `/ams-checker` | — | Lake Louise scoring, altitude zone slider, symptom cards with icons, risk result with animated progress bar, HACE/HAPE danger alerts, actionable steps |
| TripHistory | `/trip-history` | ✓ | User trip cards with expandable breakdown table, delete with confirmation |
| NepalInfo | `/nepal-info` | — | Travel guide with weather, visa info, festivals, emergency contacts |
| PackingChecklist | `/packing` | — | Interactive checklist with NPR prices, user-scoped checked state |
| Admin | `/admin/*` | Admin | Dashboard with stat cards, destinations CRUD, users table with expandable trip history, delete user |

### Key Components

| Component | Location | Description |
|-----------|----------|-------------|
| AdminLayout | `components/AdminLayout.tsx` | Warm/light themed sidebar + top bar + child route rendering. Brand identity, navigation items, user avatar + sign out |
| ErrorBoundary | `components/ErrorBoundary.tsx` | Class-based error boundary with fallback UI + retry button + reset |
| Skeletons | `components/Skeletons.tsx` | Loading placeholder components |

### API Client (`services/api.ts`)

- `authHeaders()` — reads `localStorage` then `sessionStorage` for token
- `clearAllLocalData()` — wipes token/user/local-scoped keys from both storages
- `handleLogout()` — clears data + redirects to `/login`
- `fetchJSON<T>()` — generic fetch wrapper: adds JSON content-type + auth headers, handles 401 auto-logout, throws parsed error text
- Per-endpoint functions: `getDestinations`, `getDestination`, `getRecommendations`, `generateItinerary`, `getSafetyReport`, `getBudgetEstimate`, `elicitPreferences`, `loginUser`, `registerUser`, `getMe`, `adminGetDestinations`, `adminCreateDestination`, `adminDeleteDestination`, `saveTripHistory`, `getMyTripHistory`, `adminGetUserHistory`, `deleteTripHistory`

### Error Handling Strategy

- **API 401** → `handleLogout()` → clears ALL storage + redirects to `/login`
- **FastAPI 422** (array `detail`) → `extractErrorDetail()` extracts first `.msg` from validator error
- **FastAPI 400/401** (string `detail`) → `extractErrorDetail()` returns string directly
- **ErrorBoundary** — catches React render errors, shows retry button
- **Destinations.tsx** — explicit error state with retry button (no silent `console.error`)
- **Register.tsx** — field-mapped error display (username errors under name input, etc.)

---

## ML Engine Details

### ContentBasedRecommender (`ml/recommender.py`)
- **Algorithm**: TF-IDF vectorization → Cosine Similarity
- **Feature Text**: Combines cluster keywords + terrain + region + description + activities + difficulty + seasons + highlights
- **Score Boosting**: Duration fit (×1.2), budget fit (×1.3), fitness match (×1.2), season match (×1.25), interest overlap (×1.12 per match)
- **Caching**: Re-fits only when destination list changes (MD5 hash comparison)

### DestinationClusterer (`ml/clusterer.py`)
- **Algorithm**: K-Means (k=5, random_state=42, n_init=10)
- **Feature Vector** (10-dim): altitude_normalized, cost_normalized, terrain one-hot (3), activity one-hot (4), difficulty_score
- **Clusters**: High Himalayan Trek, Cultural Heritage, Wildlife & Terai, Adventure Hub, Remote Wilderness

### GreedyItineraryOptimizer (`ml/itinerary.py`)
- **Strategy**: Cluster-aware day construction (trek/cultural/wildlife/adventure routes)
- **Trek Routes**: Hard-coded segments for EBC (11 days), Annapurna Circuit (10), ABC (8), Langtang (7), Manaslu Circuit (12)
- **Acclimatization**: Automatic rest day every 1,000m gain above 3,000m
- **AMS Warnings**: Altitude-based reminders at 3,500m / 4,000m thresholds
- **Cost**: Accommodation-type based (budget/mid/luxury), 15% emergency buffer
- **Warnings**: Budget exceeded, fitness mismatch, cold accommodation above 4,000m

### DifficultyClassifier (`ml/difficulty.py`)
- **Algorithm**: Rule-based decision tree
- **Inputs**: max_altitude, terrain, ascent_rate, trail_exposure, season
- **Output**: Easy / Moderate / Difficult / Expert with justification

---

## Auth Architecture

### Flow
1. **Register** → `POST /api/auth/register` → Pydantic validates username (name-only regex), email (regex), password (8+ chars, uppercase+lowercase+digit) → creates user in DB → returns `MessageOut` → frontend redirects to `/login`
2. **Login** → `POST /api/auth/login` → rate-limited (20/5min per IP) → verifies password → JWT with `sub=user.id` + `rid=SERVER_RESTART_ID` + 30-day expiry → returns `Token` with user
3. **Token Validation** → `GET /api/auth/me` → `get_current_user` dependency decodes JWT, verifies `rid` matches current `SERVER_RESTART_ID`
4. **Server Restart** → `SERVER_RESTART_ID` changes → all existing JWT tokens invalid → users get 401 → frontend auto-logout → redirect to `/login`
5. **Refresh** → `POST /api/auth/refresh` → issues new JWT with current `SERVER_RESTART_ID`

### Token Structure
- **Payload**: `{ sub: "user_id", rid: "server_restart_id", exp: timestamp }`
- **Algorithm**: HS256
- **Secret**: Configurable via `SECRET_KEY` env var (default checked against weak-key blocklist)
- **Expiry**: 30 days

### Password Security
- **Hashing**: bcrypt via `passlib.CryptContext`
- **Frontend Strength**: Custom scoring (length + uppercase + digit + special) with visual bar (Weak/Fair/Good/Strong/Very Strong)

### Role System
- **Field**: `role` column in `users` table (default: "user")
- **Admin**: Set via DB seed (`init.sql`) or direct DB update
- **Enforcement**: `require_admin()` dependency checks `user.role == "admin"` + 403
- **Prevention**: `role` excluded from `UserCreate` schema — no self-promotion

---

## Storage Strategy

### Auth Persistence
| Remember Me | Token Location | Cleared On |
|-------------|---------------|------------|
| Checked | localStorage | Logout, 401 |
| Unchecked | sessionStorage | Browser close, logout, 401 |

### User-Scoped Keys
All per-user data stored with `{key}_{userId}` suffix via `userStorageKey()`:
- `favorites_{id}` — favorited destination IDs
- `preferences_draft_{id}` — wizard auto-save
- `packing_checked_{id}` — checklist state

### Data Wipe (`clearAllAppData()`)
Called on: login (before storing new auth), logout, 401 response, corrupt stored data detection. Wipes:
- `token`, `user` from both storages
- `recommendations`, `selectedDestination` from both storages
- All keys matching `USER_SCOPED_PREFIXES` (`favorites_`, `preferences_draft_`, `packing_checked_`)
- Zustand in-memory preferences store

---

## Setup

### Prerequisites
- Python 3.11+
- Node.js 18+
- PostgreSQL 16 (or Docker)
- Docker (optional, for containerized setup)

### Option 1: Full Docker
```bash
docker compose up --build
```
Backend: `http://localhost:8000`, PostgreSQL: port 5432, API docs: `http://localhost:8000/docs`

### Option 2: Docker (PostgreSQL only)
```bash
docker compose up -d db
# Then manually start backend + frontend
```

### Option 3: Manual Setup

#### Backend
```bash
cd backend
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt
# Edit .env if needed
uvicorn app.main:app --reload
```

#### Frontend
```bash
cd frontend
npm install
npm run dev
```
Frontend: `http://localhost:5173`. Vite proxies `/api/*` to `http://localhost:8000`.

### Environment Variables (`.env`)
| Variable | Default | Description |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| `DATABASE_URL` | `postgresql://nepaltrek_user:nepaltrek_pass@localhost:5432/nepaltrek_db` | PostgreSQL connection string |
| `APP_NAME` | `Nepal Trek AI` | Application name |
| `APP_VERSION` | `1.0.0` | Version string |
| `DEBUG` | `true` | Debug mode flag |
| `SECRET_KEY` | `nepal-trek-ai-secret-key-2024` | JWT signing key (change in production) |

### Seed Admin User
The `database/init.sql` runs automatically on first Docker start:
- **Admin credentials**: `admin` / `admin123`

---

## Scripts

### Frontend
```bash
npm run dev           # Development server (Vite, hot reload)
npm run build         # TypeScript check + Vite production build
npm run lint          # ESLint (flat config)
npm run preview       # Preview production build
```

### Backend
```bash
uvicorn app.main:app --reload   # Development server with hot reload
```

---

## Startup Behavior (backend/app/main.py)

On every startup, the `lifespan` handler:
1. Validates `SECRET_KEY` strength (logs warning if weak/default)
2. Runs `Base.metadata.create_all(bind=engine)` — auto-creates all ORM tables if they don't exist
3. Runs `cleanup_invalid_users()` — deletes users whose `username` doesn't match `NAME_RE` regex (along with their trip history)

This means no manual migration commands needed for development. The `SERVER_RESTART_ID` also changes every startup, invalidating all existing JWT tokens.

---

## Running Without PostgreSQL

The backend gracefully handles database unavailability via try/except in `database.py`. `SessionLocal` and `engine` are set to `None` on failure. API endpoints that don't require DB access (destinations, recommendations, safety, budgets, clusters) still work. Auth and admin routes will return 500 since DB is required.

---

## Key Implementation Details

### Frontend Error Message Extraction
FastAPI/Pydantic v2 returns 422 validation errors with `detail` as an **array** of `{ loc, msg, type }` objects. `extractErrorDetail()` in `useAuth.tsx` handles both:
- **Array `detail`** (422) — extracts `.msg` from first element
- **String `detail`** (400/401) — returns as-is

### Name Validation
- **Frontend** (Register.tsx): `/^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z .'-]{1,48}[a-zA-Z.]$/`
- **Backend** (schemas.py): Same regex via `NAME_RE`
- **Effect**: Only letters, spaces, dots, hyphens; 3-50 characters; must start with letter, end with letter or dot
- **Enforcement**: Both register (UserCreate) and profile update (UserUpdate)

### Password Validation
- Min 8 characters
- At least one uppercase letter
- At least one lowercase letter
- At least one digit
- Enforced on: register, profile update

### Trip History Save Trigger
Trip history is saved automatically when the Budget page calculates an estimate (`Budget.tsx`), capturing: destination name, budget total, currency, duration, accommodation type, full preferences snapshot, and detailed breakdown.

### Nepali Date Conversion
Uses `@sbmdkl/nepali-date-converter` package to show Bikram Sambat equivalent below the native `<input type="date">`. The date picker restricts selection to today and future dates.
